JavaScript test scripts for the `delete` operator on variables, properties, arrays, and functions.


## Files
- **[11.04.01-001.js](11.04.01-001.js.md)**: Tests the deletion of a variable in JavaScript.
- **[11.04.01-002.js](11.04.01-002.js.md)**: Tests the immutability of a variable using the delete operator in JavaScript.
- **[11.04.01-003.js](11.04.01-003.js.md)**: Tests the immutability of the Math.PI property in JavaScript.
- **[11.04.01-004.js](11.04.01-004.js.md)**: Tests the deletion of a property from an object and verifies the property is undefined.
- **[11.04.01-005.js](11.04.01-005.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the `delete` operator on an object in JavaScript.
- **[11.04.01-006.js](11.04.01-006.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the `delete` operator on object properties and prototype properties in JavaScript.
- **[11.04.01-007.js](11.04.01-007.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the `delete` operator on an array element in JavaScript.
- **[11.04.01-008.js](11.04.01-008.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the `delete` operator on a function in JavaScript.
- **[11.04.01-009.js](11.04.01-009.js.md)**: Tests the deletion of a property from the global object in JavaScript.
- **[11.04.01-010.js](11.04.01-010.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the `delete` operator on the `arguments` object in JavaScript.
- **[11.04.01-011.js](11.04.01-011.js.md)**: A test script for verifying the behavior of the delete operator on function arguments.
- **[11.04.01-012.js](11.04.01-012.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the delete operator on a function property.
- **[11.04.01-013.js](11.04.01-013.js.md)**: Tests the deletion of a variable using `eval` and `assert` in JavaScript.
- **[11.04.01-017.js](11.04.01-017.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the delete operator on a non-existent variable.
